creator: freebsd@nielsdv.eu
text:
Running in to the same issue here.
Looks very similair to this issue:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/tun0-created-by-security-openfortivpn-stopped-passing-traffic-after-upgrade-from-13-2-to-14-0.91433/

I also tried openconnect but that does not work for me either, complaining about certificates
